# Copilot Run Requirements

For every implementation run in this repository, always do all of the following before considering work complete:

1. Update README.md when behavior, interaction, setup, or developer workflow changes.
2. Ensure all tests pass.
3. Ensure code coverage is at least 80% (statements, branches, functions, lines).

## Verification checklist for each run

- [ ] README.md updated for behavior/setup changes
- [ ] Test suite passes
- [ ] Coverage run passes with >= 80% thresholds

If any item fails, continue iterating until all items pass.
